commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts ACP manager backend-failover and translator session-list/replay helpers, splits ACP manager/translator tests, and updates related test/deadcode configuration.

PR surface: Source +539, Tests -96, Other +1. Total +444 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a refactor/test split rather than a bug report. I reviewed current main and the PR source/diff instead of reproducing a failure.

target.title: refactor: clean up ACP translator and manager tests
target.body:
## Summary
- Extract ACP translator session-list and replay helpers with focused tests, and split the large translator bridge coverage into targeted files.
- Extract ACP manager backend failover decisions into a focused helper with tests.
- Split the monolithic ACP manager test coverage into shared harness plus focused failover, runtime-config, runtime-handle, and turn-result suites.
- Rebase onto latest main and fix current UI CI drift: Vite hook type narrowing plus the browser redactor dynamic-entry deadcode allowlist.
- Move ACP manager task-state test setup out of control-plane helpers so task registry boundary tests stay clean.

## Verification
- `pnpm test src/tasks/task-boundaries.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-results.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-results.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-config.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.failover.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.backend-failover.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/acp/translator.session-rate-limit.test.ts src/acp/translator.final-snapshots.test.ts src/acp/translator.prompt-size.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-config.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-setup.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-snapshot.test.ts src/acp/translator.tool-streaming.test.ts src/acp/translator.session-list.test.ts src/acp/translator.replay.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/control-ui-vite-config.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/browser-redact.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm deadcode:unused-files`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm lint:core`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean, no accepted/actionable findings after the boundary cleanup

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: internal ACP refactor only; runtime/session behavior intended unchanged while ownership and tests are split into smaller surfaces.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/pnpm repo wrappers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused ACP manager tests, focused ACP translator tests, task boundary regression test, UI Vite/redactor tests, unused-file deadcode check, test typecheck, core typecheck, core lint, Codex autoreview.
Evidence after fix: all listed local commands passed; PR CI rerun is pending after the latest force-push.
Observed result after fix: ACP manager and translator focused suites pass after the new helper/test splits; task registry boundary test stays clean; UI CI drift is fixed; autoreview reports no actionable findings.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` locally because local Crabbox is 0.21.0 and Testbox requires >=0.22.0; PR CI is the broad proof source.
target.author: steipete
